newman-confluence.last_note: Complete rigorous proof via local confluence + inline Newman; E1=E2 join identity re-derived and checked on 5000 triples. APPROVED.
newman-confluence.summary: Abstract rewriting: termination + local confluence + Newman's lemma gives a unique normal form; no formula for M.

per-prime-gcd-invariant.last_note: Complete rigorous proof of (a)+(b) via conserved g_p = gcd of p-valuations; verified independently (algebra re-derived, 1200 random runs). APPROVED.
per-prime-gcd-invariant.summary: Exact invariant g_p = gcd of p-adic valuations + lex monovariant (S,C); yields M = prod p^{g_p} for both parts.
